name: com.tclowe.lpc-character-creator
description: Use Liberated Pixel Cup (LPC) layered character art in Unity. Selective importer (manifest + auto-slicing AssetPostprocessor), runtime layered animated characters with live equip/swap, and palette recolor. Point it at a local clone of the LPC Spritesheet Character Generator; OpenGameArt scraping for missing assets is planned. NOTE: LPC art is CC-BY-SA/GPL/OGA-BY and is NOT bundled - you supply it and must credit the artists (the importer emits an attribution file).
